mobile.description: MapNG is a high-performance terrain generation tool designed for BeamNG modding.
mobile.details: To ensure the best experience with 3D rendering, precise map selection, and file management, please access this application on a desktop or laptop computer.

map.standardDescription: Amazon Terrarium (SRTM). Reliable global coverage. Good for general terrain.
map.usgsDescription: High-precision data for USA. Falls back to Standard if data is missing/corrupt.
map.gpxzDescription: Highest quality global data. Requires API Key.
map.gpxzBatchWarning: Batch jobs with GPXZ use many API calls ({tiles} tiles x multiple requests each).
map.largeAreaWarning: Large area ({area} km2). Uses multiple API calls.

surrounding.title: Surrounding Tiles
surrounding.description: Download adjacent tiles for out-of-bounds terrain. Uses standard 30m elevation, no OSM data.
surrounding.upsampleNote: Elevation upsampled from 30m source data. Same pixel size as center tile.
surrounding.error: Failed to generate surrounding tiles. Please try again.

status.runConfigCopied: Run configuration copied to clipboard (GPXZ key masked).
status.clipboardWriteUnavailable: Clipboard write unavailable in this browser/session.
status.clipboardReadUnavailable: Clipboard read unavailable in this browser/session.
status.runConfigInvalidJson: Clipboard content is not valid configuration JSON.
status.runConfigLoadedSingle: Configuration loaded. Generate to rerun with these settings.
status.runConfigLoadedBatch: Configuration loaded. Start batch to rerun with these settings.

batch.profileHelp: Controls internal scheduler concurrency for fetch/compute/encode and high-res tile fan-out.
batch.largeBatchWarning: Large batch ({count} tiles). This will take a long time and trigger many downloads.
batch.resourceHeavyBody: Large grids or high-resolution tiles can still hit browser memory or download limits.
batch.offsetHint: Move tiles independently by offsetting each tile center (X east/west, Y north/south).
batch.tileNamesHint: Defaults use row/column labels. Rename any tile to change its export ZIP filename and batch labels.
batch.highResolutionWarning: High resolution tiles require significant RAM per tile.
batch.sharedBaseline: Shared Elevation Baseline (all heightmaps use one min/max)
batch.sharedBaselineHint: Extra pre-scan required: batch runs one elevation-only pass first to compute global min/max.
batch.totalFiles: {tiles} tiles x {exports} exports = {total} total files (packaged as {tiles} ZIPs)
batch.browserDownloadHint: Your browser may ask permission to download multiple files.

upload.geotiffUnsupported: GeoTIFF - CRS unsupported, using selected coordinates
upload.noGeoMetadata: No geo metadata - using selected coordinates

preview.surroundingDesc: Adaptive adjacent tiles with seam blending and preview-optimized satellite detail for faster loading.

exportPanel.chooseFlavor: Choose a BeamNG level flavor before exporting.
exportPanel.communityQualityNotice: MapNG exports are best used as a starting point. For public releases, it is strongly recommended to do more additional world-building and polish before publishing to community mod hubs.
exportPanel.cleanupToolNotice: For a higher-detail workflow, export the GeoTIFF here and use it with
exportPanel.cleanupToolCredit: to generate a much more detailed map. Tool by AlexKidd.
exportPanel.mayTakeWhile: This may take a while for large maps

controlPanel.removeUploadedForCustomResolution: Remove the uploaded file to choose a custom resolution.
controlPanel.squareCropWithinCoverage: Square crops stay inside the uploaded coverage bounds.
controlPanel.switchToSquareCrop: Switch to Square Crop to choose a power-of-two export area inside the uploaded coverage.
controlPanel.dragMapToPositionCrop: Drag the map to position the crop box inside the uploaded coverage.
controlPanel.fetchesMaxDetail: - Fetches max detail (Terrain Z15, Sat Z17).
controlPanel.largeAreaRamWarning: Warning: Large area. May require high RAM.

batchExport.title: Export Options
batchExport.modelsNoSurroundings: 3D models generated without surrounding tiles (adjacent batch tiles serve as surroundings).

disclaimer.title: Data Accuracy Disclaimer
disclaimer.lead: Please be aware that all terrain data, heightmaps, and 3D models generated by MapNG are estimations based on available satellite and elevation datasets.
disclaimer.resolutionBody: All heightmaps are exported at 1 meter per pixel resolution to ensure consistent scaling in game engines. However, when using the Standard (30m) dataset, the terrain is upsampled. This means it will be smooth but lack the fine details found in true 1m datasets like USGS or GPXZ.
disclaimer.usage: This tool is intended for modding and creative use. It should not be used for navigation, engineering, or critical real-world planning.

about.title: About MapNG
about.subtitle: BeamNG.drive Terrain Generator
about.hero: MapNG is a desktop-focused web app for turning real-world locations into terrain, textures, GIS data, 3D meshes, and BeamNG-oriented exports.
about.whatBody: Select a location, choose an elevation source, generate the terrain, and export the parts of the workflow you need. MapNG can produce 16-bit heightmaps, satellite and OSM-derived textures, GIS exports, 3D meshes, BeamNG .ter files, and an experimental BeamNG level package. It also includes a live 3D preview with optional OSM-driven buildings, vegetation, barriers, and surrounding terrain context.
elevationItems: GPXZ Premium High-Res (Global, concurrent requests for paid plans)
previewItems: HDR environment lighting and CSM shadows
Satellite, OSM, Hybrid, and clay modes
exportItems: Job Data (.mapng) - Complete compressed session package
osmItems: Procedural road overlays and surface-aware linework
Junction fills and smoothed road/path curves
Crosswalk detection where OSM data supports it
about.surroundingBody: Download up to 8 adjacent terrain tiles as a ZIP package with heightmaps, satellite textures, and metadata - perfect for building multi-tile BeamNG worlds.
about.resolutionStrong: All heightmaps are exported at 1 meter per pixel.
about.resolutionBody: Output sizes range from 512px to 8192px (0.26 km2 to 67 km2). Standard 30m data is bilinearly upsampled for smooth surfaces.
about.batchIntro: Process large areas by defining a grid of tiles (up to 20x20). Each tile is generated sequentially with the selected exports packaged into an individual ZIP. Features include:
batchItems: Configurable grid dimensions, resolution, and export selections
Independent tile X/Y offsets and live drag editing on the map
Tiles Follow Map Center toggle for center-anchored or world-locked tile layouts
Shared Elevation Baseline option for one min/max across all tile heightmaps
Automatic stitched full-grid 16-bit verification heightmap on successful runs
Live progress tracking with color-coded tile grid and satellite thumbnails
Persistent state - pause, resume, and retry failed tiles
Automatic memory cleanup between tiles for stability
GPXZ concurrent requests for paid plans (based on account limits)
Per-tile coordinate-stamped filenames for easy organization
about.beamngBody: The BeamNG level package export is still experimental. It can build a playable level ZIP with flavor-based official assets, inferred terrain materials, water, vegetation, and a suggested level name, but it still needs more validation and polish.
additionalItems: Job Import/Export: Save and restore full sessions via .mapng files
Nominatim location search with type-categorized icons
Preset scenic locations (Grand Canyon, Mt. Fuji, Tail of the Dragon, etc.)
GPXZ plan auto-detection with concurrent request support
Light and dark mode with persistent preferences
Generation caching - skip reprocessing when switching views
Abort support for long-running generation tasks

tech.title: MapNG Tech Stack
tech.footer1: Built to assist with BeamNG.drive modding workflows.
tech.footer2: Open-source tooling for real-world terrain workflows.

core.name: Vue 3
core.desc: Composition API and reactive state management

core.name: JavaScript (ES6+)
core.desc: Modern standard with modules, async/await, and worker messaging

core.name: Tailwind CSS
core.desc: Utility-first styling with dark mode support

core.name: Vite
core.desc: Fast dev server and optimized production builds

core.name: Reactive Local State
core.desc: Pinia plus Vue refs/computed with localStorage persistence

render.name: Three.js
render.desc: WebGL 3D engine - geometry, materials, textures, export

render.name: TresJS
render.desc: Declarative Vue 3 renderer for Three.js scenes

render.name: Cascaded Shadow Maps
render.desc: 4-cascade CSM with 4096px shadow maps and PCF filtering

render.name: HDR Environment
render.desc: 4K puresky HDRI for realistic ambient and reflection lighting

render.name: GLTFExporter
render.desc: Full 3D model export with terrain, OSM features and surroundings

map.name: Leaflet and Vue-Leaflet
map.desc: Interactive 2D map with 3 base layers and dark mode

map.name: proj4 and GeoTIFF
map.desc: CRS reprojection, DEM parsing and GeoTIFF export

map.name: Local Transverse Mercator
map.desc: Custom metric projection for pixel-perfect 1m/px grids

map.name: Nominatim Geocoding
map.desc: Dual-endpoint search plus reverse lookup for suggested BeamNG level names

tex.name: HTML5 Canvas API
tex.desc: Procedural texture generation up to 8192x8192 with OSM land-use, roads, and overlays

tex.name: fast-png
tex.desc: 16-bit precision heightmap and road mask encoding

tex.name: OSM Lane Renderer
tex.desc: Procedural road overlays, junction fills, crosswalk hints, and smoothed curves

tex.name: Web Workers
tex.desc: Off-thread terrain and image resampling with transferable buffers

src.name: AWS Terrain Tiles
src.desc: Global 30m SRTM elevation (Terrarium encoding at Z15)

src.name: USGS National Map
src.desc: 1m DEM via TNM Access API (CONUS, Alaska, Hawaii)

src.name: GPXZ API
src.desc: Premium global hi-res elevation with auto-chunking, rate-limit probing and concurrent requests for paid plans

src.name: Overpass API (OSM)
src.desc: Roads, buildings, land-use, vegetation, barriers (3 failover endpoints)

src.name: JSZip
src.desc: Client-side ZIP packaging for BeamNG levels, surrounding tiles, batch jobs, and .mapng sessions

src.name: Blob URL Management
src.desc: Binary handling for large textures, heightmaps, and packaged exports

deploy.name: Cloudflare Pages
deploy.desc: Global edge-deployed static hosting via Wrangler CLI

batchProgress.memoryUnavailable: Memory sampling unavailable in this browser; timings still captured.
batchProgress.pausedDesc: {count} tile{suffix} completed. You can resume where you left off.

status.addingOsm: Adding OSM data to existing terrain...

error.fetchTerrain: Failed to fetch terrain data. The requested area might be too large or service is down.
error.usgsFallback:
USGS 1m data for this area was missing or corrupt. Falling back to the Standard Terrarium dataset.

Output remains on the app's 1m/px processing grid.

support.cardBody: If MapNG helps your workflow, tips help keep development going. Optional, always appreciated.
support.modalBody: MapNG will always remain free to use, and donations are completely optional.
support.modalBodySecondary: If you want to support ongoing updates, bug fixes, and new export improvements, you can tip once or become a monthly supporter on Ko-fi.
